'''Vagno''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Langhesi]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], he helped create ''[[Jabitha]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
